name: linear
description: Read team issues and create/update follow-up tickets from loop state (Post-Merge, Dependency, CI Sweeper).
usage: Loop reads existing issue, appends status or creates 'loop-followup' issue with link back to PR/state. Human does final triage/close on high-risk items.
safety: Do not auto-close customer-facing or security issues. Record Linear issue ID in STATE.md.
